meaning: [复]n.具有热带特性的东西,热带产物
examples: Tropicana got into the mind with a great name and built a new category.
Last month, PepsiCo introduced a major overhaul of the Tropicana packaging.
Since March four companies have made 12 bids for Aztar, Tropicana's parent company in Phoenix.
But one fateful Sunday, a frantic pastry chef at the Tropicana Hotel called in a panic.
